metadata.website_type: software development and hardware services company

tasks.name: Add a 16GB RAM business laptop under $1200 with 4+ stars (quantity 2) to cart
tasks.description: Find a business laptop with at least 16GB RAM, 512GB SSD, a 14–15.6 inch display, price under $1200, rating 4.0 stars or higher, and add 2 units of the cheapest matching model to the cart.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
Click on the main navigation menu item labeled "Products" and select "Laptops" from the dropdown.
In the laptop category page, locate the search or filter sidebar and click on the "Usage Type" filter, then select the "Business" checkbox.
Click on the "RAM" filter section and select the "16GB" option (or higher if only ranges are available that include 16GB).
Click on the "Storage" filter section and select "512GB SSD" (or the closest matching SSD option that is at least 512GB).
Find the "Screen Size" filter and adjust it so that only laptops between 14 inches and 15.6 inches are shown.
In the "Price" filter, set the maximum price field to "1200" and apply the filter.
Locate the "Rating" filter and select only items rated 4.0 stars and above.
Use the sort dropdown and select the option "Price: Low to High" to order the results by ascending price.
From the sorted results list, click on the first laptop product card, set the quantity field on the product page to "2", and click the "Add to Cart" button.

tasks.name: Submit a quote request for a custom CRM integration project with a defined budget and timeline
tasks.description: Request a quote for a custom CRM integration software project, selecting the appropriate service category, specifying a budget between $15,000–$25,000, a start date next month, and preferring phone contact.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
Click on the main navigation menu item labeled "Services" and select "Software Development" from the dropdown.
On the Software Development page, locate and click the section or card titled "CRM Integration" or the closest equivalent service.
Click the "Request a Quote" or "Get a Quote" button associated with the CRM Integration service to open the quote request form.
In the form, enter your full name as "Alex Johnson" and your email address as "alex.johnson@example.com" in the respective fields.
In the "Project Type" or "Service" dropdown, select the option that most closely matches "Custom CRM Integration".
In the "Estimated Budget" section, choose or type a budget range that falls between $15,000 and $25,000 (for example, select "$15,000–$25,000" if available).
In the "Desired Start Date" field or date picker, select a date that is in the next calendar month and falls between the 5th and the 20th of that month.
In the "Preferred Contact Method" section, select the "Phone" option and enter a phone number such as "555-123-4567" if a number field is provided.
In the "Project Description" textarea, type a short description including the phrase "Integrate our existing CRM with our billing system" and then click the "Submit Quote Request" button.

tasks.name: Schedule an on-site hardware maintenance visit for 10–20 workstations next month
tasks.description: Book an on-site hardware maintenance service visit for an office with 10–20 workstations, choosing a date between the 10th and 20th of next month, selecting a morning time slot, and specifying the office location.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
Click on the "Services" menu item and choose "Hardware Services" or "On-Site Support" from the dropdown.
On the Hardware Services page, locate and click the option labeled "Schedule Maintenance" or "Book On-Site Visit" to open the scheduling form.
In the "Service Type" dropdown, select an option related to "Workstation Maintenance" or the closest matching service.
In the "Number of Devices" or "Workstations" field, enter a number between 10 and 20, such as "15".
Use the date picker to select a date in the next calendar month that falls between the 10th and 20th of that month.
In the "Time Slot" or "Preferred Time" section, select a morning option (for example, "9:00 AM – 12:00 PM").
Fill in the "Office Address" field with "1200 Market Street, Suite 500" and the "City" field with "San Francisco" and "ZIP" with "94103".
Enter a contact name "Morgan Lee" and email "morgan.lee@example.com" in the relevant fields.
Click the "Confirm Booking" or "Schedule Visit" button to submit the maintenance visit request.

tasks.name: Choose the cheapest IT support plan that includes 24/7 support and on-site visits and start sign-up
tasks.description: Compare managed IT support plans and select the lowest-priced plan that includes both 24/7 support and on-site visit coverage, then proceed to the sign-up form and fill in basic company details.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
Click on the "Services" or "Solutions" menu and select "Managed IT Support" from the available options.
On the Managed IT Support page, scroll to the section displaying multiple support plans (e.g., Basic, Standard, Premium).
For each listed plan, locate the features list and identify which plans include both "24/7 Support" and "On-Site Visits" or equivalent wording.
Among the plans that include both 24/7 support and on-site visits, identify the one with the lowest monthly price and click its "View Details" or "Select Plan" button.
On the selected plan's detail page, click the "Get Started" or "Sign Up" button to open the sign-up form.
In the form, enter the company name as "Brightline Analytics LLC" and the company size as "25–50 employees" if a size dropdown is provided.
Fill in the contact person's name as "Jamie Carter" and the business email as "jamie.carter@example.com".
Enter the business phone number as "555-987-6543" and select the country or region (for example, "United States") from any location dropdown.
Click the "Continue" or "Next" button to proceed from the initial sign-up step for the selected plan.

tasks.name: Save a knowledge base article on server overheating for a specific server model
tasks.description: Use the support knowledge base to find a troubleshooting article about server overheating for a specified server model and add that article to your saved items or favorites list.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
Click on the "Support" or "Resources" menu and select "Knowledge Base" or "Help Center" from the options.
In the knowledge base search bar, type "server overheating" and press Enter to search.
Use any available product or model filter and select a server model named "ProRack Server X200" (or the closest matching model name available).
From the filtered search results, locate an article whose title includes both "overheating" and the model name "X200" or "ProRack Server" and click on that article title.
On the article page, scroll to find a control labeled "Save", "Bookmark", or a favorites icon (such as a star or heart) and click it to add the article to your saved items.
If a category or folder selection appears for saved items, choose a folder labeled "Server Issues" or create a new folder with that name if the option is provided.
After saving, click on the "My Saved Articles", "Bookmarks", or equivalent link in the support section navigation to open your saved articles list.
In the saved items list, locate the entry for the "server overheating" article you just added and click its title to reopen it.
Scroll within the reopened article until you reach the "Recommended Next Steps" or similar section to complete the task interaction.

tasks.name: Add three different hardware accessories under $50 with 4+ star ratings and free shipping to cart and apply a promo code
tasks.description: Find three different categories of hardware accessories (e.g., keyboard, mouse, cable), each priced under $50, rated 4.0 stars or higher, with free shipping, add one of each to the cart, and apply the promo code "SAVE10" at checkout.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
Click on the "Products" menu and select "Accessories" from the dropdown.

Use the category filter to first select a "Keyboards" category (or equivalent), then apply a price filter with a maximum of "$50", a rating filter of "4 stars & up", and a shipping filter for "Free Shipping".
From the filtered keyboard results, click on the first product card shown and on its product page click the "Add to Cart" button with quantity set to "1".

Return to the Accessories listing page, change the category filter to "Mice" (or equivalent), keep the price under $50, 4+ stars, and free shipping filters, then click on the second product from the results grid and add one unit to the cart.

Return again to the Accessories listing, change the category filter to a cable type such as "Cables" or "USB Cables", keep the same price, rating, and shipping filters, then click on the third product in the results list and add one unit to the cart.
Click on the cart icon or "View Cart" link in the header to open the cart page.
On the cart page, locate the promo code or coupon field, type "SAVE10" into the field, and click the "Apply" button.
If a shipping method section is visible, select the standard shipping option that shows $0 cost or is labeled "Free Shipping".
Click the "Proceed to Checkout" or "Checkout" button to move to the next step in the purchase process.

tasks.name: Register for an upcoming cloud migration training session and set experience level
tasks.description: Find an upcoming training or webinar session about cloud migration scheduled for a date in the future, register one seat for it, choose an appropriate time zone, and indicate an "Intermediate" experience level.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
Click on the "Resources" or "Training" menu and select "Events & Webinars" or "Training Sessions" from the dropdown.
On the events listing page, use the search bar to type "cloud migration" and press Enter to filter events.
In any date filter controls, ensure only future dates are shown, then locate a training or webinar session whose title includes "Cloud Migration" and click on it.
On the event details page, click the "Register" or "Sign Up" button to open the registration form.
In the registration form, enter your name as "Taylor Morgan" and your email as "taylor.morgan@example.com".
In the "Number of Seats" or "Attendees" field, enter "1" as the quantity.
Locate the "Time Zone" dropdown and select "UTC-05:00" or the label corresponding to "Eastern Time (US & Canada)".
In the "Experience Level" dropdown or radio buttons, select the "Intermediate" option.
Click the "Complete Registration" or "Submit" button to finalize the sign-up for the cloud migration session.

tasks.name: Configure a custom server between $3,000 and $4,000 and add it to a quote cart with a maintenance plan
tasks.description: Use the server configurator to build a custom rack server with at least 32GB RAM and 2TB total storage, keep the total price between $3,000 and $4,000, select a 3-year maintenance plan, and add the configuration to a quote cart.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
Click on the "Products" menu and select "Servers" from the dropdown, then choose a "Custom Configure" or "Build Your Own" option if available.
In the server configurator, select a rack server chassis or model from the initial model list by clicking the option labeled as a rack server (for example, "Rack Server R500").
In the "Memory" or "RAM" configuration section, select a RAM option that provides at least 32GB (for example, "32GB" or "64GB").
In the "Storage" section, choose enough drives or capacity options to reach at least 2TB of total storage (for example, select "2 x 1TB SSD" or "1 x 2TB HDD").

Locate the price summary area and adjust any optional components (such as GPU or additional accessories) by deselecting or selecting them so that the total price displayed falls between $3,000 and $4,000 inclusive.
Scroll to the "Support & Maintenance" section and select a support plan labeled "3-Year Maintenance" or the closest matching 3-year option.
After confirming the configuration, click the button labeled "Add to Quote", "Save Configuration", or "Add to Quote Cart".
Click on the "Quote Cart" or "View Quote" link or icon, usually found in the header or near the configurator, to open the quote cart page.
On the quote cart page, locate and click the "Proceed with Quote" or "Request Formal Quote" button to move to the next step in the quoting process.

entities.name: ProductCategory

entities.name: Product

fields.description: True if this product links into the custom server configurator

entities.name: PromoCode
